English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Renew Media: Rockefeller Foundation Fellowships in New Media Art
Rockefeller Foundation
Video Resources (organization)
Rose Goldsen Archive of New Media Art
6673
16 cubic feet. 16 cubic feet.
2003-2008. Printed material, CDs, digital media The collection consists of artist's files submitted to sponsors the Rockefeller Foundation and National Video Resources in application for New Media Fellowships. Collection material in English 5653212
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Peter MartinezKatherine TalcottMickey CasadCelena Huo
Date completed:
2012
EAD encoding:
Peter MartinezKatherine TalcottCelena Huo
Date modified:
Kristen Reichenbach, August 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
The collection consists of artists' files submitted to the Rockefeller Foundation and National Video Resources, who sponsored the New Media Fellowships. The files comprise artistic proposals and outlines, individual artists' curricula vitae, recommendation and reference letters, and supporting digital and media art on CDs or DVDs.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Rockefeller New Media Fellowships 2003 Boxes 1-4
Series II. Rockefeller New Media Fellowships 2004 Boxes 5-7
Series III. Rockefeller New Media Fellowships 2005 Boxes 8-10
Series IV. Rockefeller New Media Fellowships 2006 Boxes 11-13
Series V. Rockefeller New Media Fellowships 2007 Boxes 14-15
Series VI. Rockefeller New Media Fellowships 2008 Box 16
General
Links to the artist's webpages are not maintained. The URLs for these projects are provided, but many no longer go anywhere. You may have success finding archived versions of them using the Internet Archive Wayback Machine, http://web.archive.org
General
Some digital content has been archived by Cornell and that content can be found by following the links labeled "Link to archived internet material."
Cite As:
Renew Media/Rockefeller Foundation Fellowships in New Media Art #6673 . Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Interactive videos. Computer art. Electronic records. Artists.
